content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 21, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on authentication and login improvements, specifically integrating wallet and GitHub login workflows alongside server-side session management. The team also addressed UI styling inconsistencies for wallet providers.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Authentication and Session Management**
*   Implemented a combined authentication workflow featuring wallet and GitHub login, alongside server-side Steward token refresh to resolve silent-logout issues ([#463](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/463)).

**UI/UX Improvements**
*   Updated `@stwd/react` to version 0.7.2 to fix text wrapping and inconsistent button styling for EVM/Solana wallet providers ([#464](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/464)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#466](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/466): Migrate `app-auth/authorize` to Steward.
*   [#465](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/465): Fix login UI to ensure native Ethereum and Solana buttons match the styling of Google/Discord buttons.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Commerce and Security Proposals**
*   [#6977](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/6977): Closed a proposal regarding Merxex integration for agent commerce.
*   [#7007](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7007): Closed a feature request regarding a PII sanitization layer for LLM processing.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
